attributes.title: [Couchbase] SRE Capacity planning
attributes.description: Headroom for RAM, disk, and buckets — disk fetches, quotas, and index service memory.

params.markdown:
## [Couchbase] SRE Capacity planning

Plan scaling before errors dominate:
- Cluster RAM and RAM-quota headroom (data + index services)
- Free disk and data footprint growth
- Worst bucket RAM quota and disk fetch pressure
- Index service RAM utilisation (N1QL/GSI)

query.esql:
FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| EVAL ram_pct = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.used.value.bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.total.bytes)
| STATS avg_ram_pct = AVG(ram_pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| EVAL ram_pct = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.used.value.bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.total.bytes)
| STATS avg_ram_pct = AVG(ram_pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| EVAL q_pct = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.quota.used.value.bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.quota.total.value.bytes)
| STATS ram_quota_pct = AVG(q_pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| EVAL q_pct = 100.0 * TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.quota.used.value.bytes) / TO_DOUBLE(couchbase.cluster.ram.quota.total.value.bytes)
| STATS ram_quota_pct = AVG(q_pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| STATS min_hdd_free = MIN(couchbase.cluster.hdd.free.bytes)

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| STATS min_hdd_free = MIN(couchbase.cluster.hdd.free.bytes)

FROM metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.bucket"
| STATS peak_disk_fetches = MAX(couchbase.bucket.disk.fetches)

FROM metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.bucket"
| STATS peak_disk_fetches = MAX(couchbase.bucket.disk.fetches)

FROM metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.bucket"
| STATS peak_ram_quota_pct = MAX(couchbase.bucket.ram.quota.used.pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.bucket"
| STATS peak_ram_quota_pct = MAX(couchbase.bucket.ram.quota.used.pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.query_index-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.query_index"
| STATS avg_idx_ram = AVG(couchbase.query_index.ram.pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.query_index-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.query_index"
| STATS avg_idx_ram = AVG(couchbase.query_index.ram.pct)

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| STATS used = AVG(couchbase.cluster.ram.used.value.bytes), total = AVG(couchbase.cluster.ram.total.bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| STATS used = AVG(couchbase.cluster.ram.used.value.bytes), total = AVG(couchbase.cluster.ram.total.bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| STATS free = AVG(couchbase.cluster.hdd.free.bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| STATS free = AVG(couchbase.cluster.hdd.free.bytes) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| STATS data_mb = AVG(couchbase.cluster.memory.quota.mb), index_mb = AVG(couchbase.cluster.memory.quota.index.mb) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.cluster"
| STATS data_mb = AVG(couchbase.cluster.memory.quota.mb), index_mb = AVG(couchbase.cluster.memory.quota.index.mb) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Bucket RAM quota utilisation by bucket

query.esql:
FROM metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.bucket"
| STATS ram_quota_pct = MAX(couchbase.bucket.ram.quota.used.pct) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.bucket.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.bucket"
| STATS ram_quota_pct = MAX(couchbase.bucket.ram.quota.used.pct) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.bucket.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.bucket"
| STATS fetches = MAX(couchbase.bucket.disk.fetches) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.bucket.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.bucket"
| STATS fetches = MAX(couchbase.bucket.disk.fetches) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchbase.bucket.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-couchbase.query_index-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.query_index"
| STATS idx_ram = AVG(couchbase.query_index.ram.pct)
| EVAL min_b = 0.0
| EVAL max_b = 100.0
| EVAL goal_b = 75.0

FROM metrics-couchbase.query_index-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.query_index"
| STATS idx_ram = AVG(couchbase.query_index.ram.pct)
| EVAL min_b = 0.0
| EVAL max_b = 100.0
| EVAL goal_b = 75.0

TS metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.bucket"
| STATS peak_ram_pct = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchbase.bucket.ram.quota.used.pct)), peak_fetches = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchbase.bucket.disk.fetches)), peak_items = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchbase.bucket.item.count)), peak_disk = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchbase.bucket.disk.used.bytes)), peak_ops = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchbase.bucket.operations_per_sec)) BY b = couchbase.bucket.name
| SORT peak_ram_pct DESC
| LIMIT 50

TS metrics-couchbase.bucket-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchbase.bucket"
| STATS peak_ram_pct = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchbase.bucket.ram.quota.used.pct)), peak_fetches = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchbase.bucket.disk.fetches)), peak_items = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchbase.bucket.item.count)), peak_disk = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchbase.bucket.disk.used.bytes)), peak_ops = MAX(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchbase.bucket.operations_per_sec)) BY b = couchbase.bucket.name
| SORT peak_ram_pct DESC
| LIMIT 50
